user.title: Connect to Fireboard
user.description: Sign in with your Fireboard account credentials. Your password is exchanged for an API token and is not stored.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Fireboard
reauth_confirm.description: Your Fireboard session has expired. Please sign in again.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Fireboard. Please check your internet connection.
error.rate_limited: Fireboard rate limit reached. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See logs for details.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the Fireboard cloud. Minimum 30 seconds to respect the API rate limit.
